violations.text: Sauteed Peppers and Onions was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2025

The door to the establishment's toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation areas shall be self-closing to prevent potential contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen and coffee bar area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Establishment is to replace the ceiling tiles with approved ceiling tiles that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026
